name: baxcalibur
flavor_texts: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.
text: Baxcalibur is the Ice Dragon Pokémon. It is a dragon and ice-type Pokémon. Abilities: thermal-exchange, ice-body (hidden). Base stats — HP: 115, Attack: 145, Defense: 92, Sp. Atk: 75, Sp. Def: 86, Speed: 87. Evolution line: frigibax → arctibax → baxcalibur. Lore: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava. It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.
